ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Alex-Rachel/TEngine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Alex-Rachel/TEngine
Language: c%23
Unity 商用级别开发框架，原生内置 AI 工作流支持，集成 HybridCLR 高性能热更、Obfuz 代码混淆加固、YooAssets 企业级资源管理方案，构建高效、安全、可扩展的工业化开发底座。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The future of .NET UI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Devolutions/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Devolutions/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Facepunch/sbox-public
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Facepunch/sbox-public
Language: c%23
s&box is a modern game engine, built on Valve's Source 2 and the latest .NET technology, it provides a modern intuitive editor for creating games

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IAmParadox27/jellyfin-plugin-home-sections
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IAmParadox27/jellyfin-plugin-home-sections
Language: c%23
Add server provided home sections to your Jellyfin instance

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI Skills, MCP Tools, and CLI for Unity Engine. Full AI develop and test loop. Use cli for quick setup. Efficient token usage, advanced tools. Any C# method may be turned into a tool by a single line. Works with Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor and any other absolutely for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JasperFx/wolverine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JasperFx/wolverine
Language: c%23
Supercharged .NET server side development!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MattParkerDev/SharpIDE
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MattParkerDev/SharpIDE
Language: c%23
A modern, cross platform IDE for .NET, built with .NET & Godot

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenTabletDriver/OpenTabletDriver
Language: c%23
Open source, cross-platform, user-mode tablet driver

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OrchardCMS/OrchardCore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OrchardCMS/OrchardCore
Language: c%23
Orchard Core is an open-source modular and multi-tenant application framework built with ASP.NET Core, and a content management system (CMS) built on top of that framework.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Seafoam-Labs/Shelly-ALPM

Pacman alternative for ArchLinux, designed with you in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

URL: https://github.com/dotnet/eShop

URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lucasg/Dependencies
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lucasg/Dependencies
Language: c%23
A rewrite of the old legacy software "depends.exe" in C# for Windows devs to troubleshoot dll load dependencies issues.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/aspire

Aspire is the tool for code-first, extensible, observable dev and deploy.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
